_legend.SD: Schematic-Dimensioned: architectural drawing with room labels + dimensions in text layer
_legend.RD: Rendered-Dimensioned: 3D renders or image-only floor plans, no extractable text for dimensions
_legend.RL: Rendered-Legend: rendered floor plans with area table/legend (sqft/sqm) but no room dimensions
_legend.MU: Multi-Unit: multiple distinct floor plan types on a single page
_legend.MF: Multi-Floor: villa/duplex with separate floor plans per level
_legend.TS: Table-Summary: floor plan data primarily in tables, minimal or no diagrams

_notes: primary_type is the dominant format. secondary_types lists other formats present in the brochure. Classification done 2026-02-12 via text analysis of PDF text layer + page structure. Needs visual verification during ground truth review.

evelyn.notes: Full brochure. Floor plan pages (21-23) have sqft/sqm area labels but no room dimensions in text. Area tables present.

expo_valley.notes: Full brochure with area tables. Known mm-to-sqft conversion bug.

hilton.notes: 117 MB. Mostly image-based. Pages 27-29 have bedroom labels only, no dimensions or areas in text.

novayas.notes: Floor plan pages (16-30) have unit type labels (Studio Type A, 1BR Type A, etc.) but zero dimensions or areas in text. Vision-only extraction.

sobha_eden.notes: Full brochure. Area tables present. Known price-as-bathroom-count bug.

artistry_one.notes: Mostly marketing. Key plan pages (33-45) show unit labels but no dimensions. Some area labels on penthouse pages.

avarra_palace.notes: Floor plans only. Rich text: room labels + dimensions (4.27m X 4.03m) + area tables (sqft/sqm suite/balcony/total). 28 pages.

bashayer.notes: 50 pages. ZERO extractable text. Pure image-based floor plans. Vision-only extraction required.

bella_passo.notes: 272 pages. Large collection with area tables. Includes penthouses and mansions (likely multi-floor).

crestlane_4.notes: 34 pages. Area tables with unit types. Floor plan diagrams with legend.

crestlane_5.notes: 39 pages. Area tables with unit types. Floor plan diagrams with legend.

expo_valley_fp.notes: 9 pages. Floor plans document (separate from main brochure). Area tables with 8 unit types.

pinnacle_sobha.notes: 51 pages, 2.3 MB. Rich text with dimensions in mm (e.g. 3050 X 4500) + area tables. Text-first extraction ideal.

wedyan_canal.file: Floor plans - Wedyan The Canal by Al Ghurair Collection.pdf
wedyan_canal.notes: 16 pages. Large villas (3-5 bed). Area labels (sqm/sqft) with suite/balcony/total. Room labels present. Some multi-floor villas.

haus_tenet.notes: 79 pages, 46 MB. OFFICE building (87 clusters). Minimal floor plan content. Mostly marketing imagery.

inaura.notes: 100 pages. Floor plans (pages 51-68) have room dimensions (4.6 x 3.1 M), area labels (Suite/Balcony/Total sqft/sqm). Sky Villa duplexes are multi-floor. Very rich text data.

mareva.notes: 11 pages. Area tables present. The Oasis is a villa community -- likely multi-floor.

mareva2.notes: 11 pages. Area tables present. The Oasis is a villa community -- likely multi-floor.

olive_farms.notes: 3 pages only, 0.1 MB. Tiny file. Dimensions in text (m format) + area tables. Likely villa/farm with multi-floor.
